evals.prompt: Analyze https://example.com/products/widget, find low-hanging-fruit keywords, and create three suggestions for every page and social metadata field in the default report location.
evals.expected_output: Inspects the exact page with both DataForSEO OnPage calls, derives five seeds, makes five bounded Related Keywords calls, deduplicates and scores complete relevant rows, and writes the dated report under SEO/example.com/.
assertions: The workflow calls Instant Pages and Content Parsing for the exact supplied URL, but derives exactly five seeds solely from parsed primary content and headings.
Existing metadata, URL components, domain, and TLD are excluded from topic, intent, geographic-scope, and seed derivation.
It makes one Related Keywords call per seed with depth 2, limit 25, and the selected market, for five calls total.
The top 20 are deduplicated and sorted by search_volume / (keyword_difficulty + 10), with organic KD distinguished from Ads competition.
The report contains three suggestions for each of seven metadata fields, character counts, and a top-20 metrics table.
The path follows SEO/example.com/YYYY-MM-DD_Page-Metadata_https_example.com_products_widget.md.

evals.prompt: Create page metadata suggestions and a keyword report for my landing page.
evals.expected_output: Asks for the missing absolute HTTP(S) page URL and waits without making a billable request or creating a report.
assertions: The workflow asks for one absolute HTTP(S) page URL and waits.
No DataForSEO call or report is produced before the URL is supplied.

evals.prompt: Run seo-page-metadata for https://www.example.de/leistungen/seo?source=nav using Germany and de, and save it under ./client-reports.
evals.expected_output: Preserves the exact page URL for analysis, normalizes example.de for the directory, respects the market and output overrides, and produces the complete evidence-based metadata report.
assertions: Both OnPage calls use the supplied URL while the report directory uses the normalized hostname example.de.
All five Related Keywords calls use Germany and de with depth 2 and limit 25.
Missing keyword metrics are not coerced to zero and a shortfall is disclosed if fewer than 20 relevant complete rows exist.
The report is saved under ./client-reports/example.de/ with a sanitized full-URL filename.

evals.prompt: Analyze https://example.org/lahore/mobile-vet and improve its metadata. The current title and description incorrectly describe an online pet store, while the parsed main content offers mobile veterinary visits throughout Lahore.
evals.expected_output: Audits the incorrect metadata without using it as topic evidence, derives five veterinary seeds from primary content, adds Lahore naturally to applicable local-service seeds, resolves Lahore to Pakistan for keyword calls when no market override is supplied, and documents those decisions.
assertions: The incorrect pet-store metadata is reported but excluded from topic, intent, geographic-scope, seed, and suggestion evidence.
Exactly five seeds are based solely on parsed mobile-veterinary content and use Lahore naturally where applicable.
With no user market override, all five Related Keywords calls use Pakistan because Lahore is an explicit and unambiguous service area.
The report names the detected geographic scope and explains that the keyword market came from primary content.

evals.prompt: Create page and social metadata for https://example.com/consulting. The page has no title or description. Its main content says the consultancy serves manufacturers across Ontario, Canada; the Toronto office address appears only in the footer.
evals.expected_output: Uses the parsed consulting content rather than missing metadata, treats Ontario and Canada as the supported service scope, does not infer Toronto targeting from the footer address, and uses Canada for all keyword calls.
assertions: Missing metadata does not prevent content-only topic and seed derivation.
Ontario or Canada is incorporated naturally into applicable consulting seeds.
Toronto is not treated as a target geography because it appears only in the footer address.
All five Related Keywords calls use Canada when no market override is supplied.

evals.prompt: Analyze https://example.net/services/mobile-vet for Germany and de. The main content says the service operates only in Lahore, Pakistan.
evals.expected_output: Uses Lahore veterinary content for the five geographically relevant seeds, respects the explicit Germany/de keyword-market override, and clearly discloses the mismatch instead of silently replacing the requested market.
assertions: The five seeds remain grounded in primary content and incorporate Lahore where applicable.
All five Related Keywords calls use the explicit Germany and de override.
The report discloses the conflict between the requested keyword market and the content-derived service geography.
